someday, somewhere

Her Dream Place

A quiet world of her own — half home, half garden, with the Ganga glowing gold at sunrise in the distance.

"An open aangan, a quiet pond, lavender in every corner — and the Ganga glowing gold just beyond the trees."

5 katha total land 2.5 katha home 2.5 katha garden 1 pond in the middle ∞ flowers
